raw_response: {"file_type": "openapi_specification_json","line_count": 1,"functions": [],"classes": [],"imports": [],"complexity_notes": "OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification for a Task Manager REST API (title: 'Task Manager API', version 2.4.1). Content is delivered as a single, heavily minified JSON line with no significant whitespace. Defines 12 operations across 7 paths and 5 tags (Tasks, Assignments, Comments, Attachments, Search & Batch). Operations: listTasks (GET /tasks, 7 query params including status/priority/assignee_id/created_after/created_before/pagination), createTask (POST /tasks), getTask (GET /tasks/{task_id}), updateTask (PATCH /tasks/{task_id}, returns 409 on TASK_LOCKED), deleteTask (DELETE /tasks/{task_id}), assignTask (PATCH /tasks/{task_id}/assign), listComments (GET /tasks/{task_id}/comments), createComment (POST /tasks/{task_id}/comments, supports threaded replies via parent_id with Markdown body up to 10k chars), listAttachments (GET /tasks/{task_id}/attachments), uploadAttachment (POST /tasks/{task_id}/attachments, multipart/form-data, max 25 MB, returns 413 on overflow), searchTasks (POST /tasks/search, full-text across title/description/comments/tags with filters and pagination), batchTasks (POST /tasks/batch, supports up to 50 operations with actions update_status/assign/set_priority/add_tag/remove_tag and per-op result reporting). Defines 12 reusable schemas (TaskStatus enum with 6 values, Priority enum with 4 values, User, Task with extensive validation patterns, TaskCreateRequest, TaskUpdateRequest with minProperties=1, Comment, Attachment with signed URL expiry, Pagination, ErrorResponse with request_id pattern req_[a-z0-9]{8}, TaskListResponse, CommentListResponse). Uses two security schemes (bearerAuth/JWT and apiKey X-API-Key header, applied as alternatives). Task IDs follow strict regex pattern ^task_[a-z0-9]{10}$. All error responses share the ErrorResponse envelope via reusable response components (BadRequest, Unauthorized, NotFound, InternalError). No executable code, no imports, no functions or classes — purely declarative schema/contract metadata.","structure": {"api": {"openapi_version": "3.1.0", "title": "Task Manager API", "version": "2.4.1"}, "servers_count": 3, "security_schemes": ["bearerAuth (JWT, http/bearer)", "apiKey (header: X-API-Key)"], "tag_count": 5, "path_count": 7, "operation_count": 12, "schema_count": 12, "reusable_response_count": 4, "total_endpoints": 12}}
